LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, SUBMITTED ON OCT. 03, 2008 IS DENIED. ORDER SIGMED ON OCT. 23, 2008. JUDGE PAUL H. ALVATADO, (301)
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CARMEN MADRIZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. CARMEN MADRIZ HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A.J. ROBERTSON; CLERK: E.BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR #4280 (206)
